Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center

61 
CVRD_LVL_CARE_THRU_DT 
LABEL: 
Date covered level of care ended in a SNF 
DESCRIPTION: The date on which a covered level of care ended in a SNF. 
SHORT NAME: CVRLVLDT 
LONG NAME: CVRD_LVL_CARE_THRU_DT 
TYPE: 
DATE 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field comes from the date associated with occurrence code = 22 if present on any of the claims 
included in the stay. If multiple
